overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night in the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves along wet streets illuminated by neon signs and street lamps, passing through an intersection with ghostly holographic pedestrians and approaching a metro station. The scene features heavy atmospheric rain, reflective wet surfaces, and dystopian urban architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person walk along a rainy cyberpunk city sidewalk. A palm tree stands on the left while metal railings and green dumpsters line the right side next to a building. The wet pavement reflects the neon street lights. A pedestrian in dark clothing appears walking toward the camera on the left before the scene transitions.

ghostly holographic pedestrians appear crossing the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt intersection, moving through the crosswalk toward ghostly figures in the distance

entered.detail: wide urban street intersection with multiple lanes
marked pedestrian crosswalk with distinctive red, white, and blue pattern
semi-transparent holographic figures walking across the street

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a wide rainy intersection marked with a colorful crosswalk pattern. Ghostly holographic pedestrians appear crossing the street ahead, creating an eerie atmosphere. The palm tree recedes into the background as the player moves through the open space, leaving the building with dumpsters behind.

large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a street beneath an elevated highway overpass, approaching a distinctive NCART metro station with a large circular illuminated sign. Neon billboards glow on the right side of the street. The holographic pedestrians fade from view as the player moves deeper under the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station entrance beneath elevated highway

events.description: slight turn to the right to navigate around the metro station entrance

agents.ego_description: passing the NCART metro station entrance, observing the illuminated signage and street-level details

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine on the sidewalk near the metro
entrance to the NCART station with glowing doors and circular signage

segments.scene_description: The player passes the NCART metro station on the left, moving beneath the elevated highway in a more sheltered area. The large circular station sign glows brightly. A vending machine becomes visible on the right as the player continues past the station entrance, navigating around the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that transitions from an open sidewalk into the sheltered depths of a transit hub. It begins with a walk along a wet pavement reflecting neon lights, passing a lone palm tree and green dumpsters while a dark-clad pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the player crosses a colorful crosswalk amidst eerie, ghostly holographic pedestrians. The perspective then shifts beneath the heavy concrete of an elevated highway overpass, where the holograms fade and glowing neon billboards line the street. Finally, the camera glides past a brightly illuminated circular NCART metro station sign and a roadside vending machine, moving deeper into the sheltered urban architecture.
